Compliance.description: CMS registered #1087; no penalties, complaints to CMS possible; standard medical scheme regulation.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.6/5 (65 reviews, 89% 1-star); avg 3.8/5 cited elsewhere; dominant complaints on claims/service.

Product Value.description: Competitive pricing vs larger schemes, unlimited hospital/PMBs/chronic (26-55), maternity/dental, but DSP req, co-pays non-DSP, limited day-to-day on basic plans.

Innovation.description: Member app for cards/claims/hospitals/newborn reg (buggy); KEYHEALTH REWARDS, Health Booster, Smart Baby, Easy-ER programs; digital claims/portal.

Customer Support.description: 0860 671 050 (7:30-18:00 Mon-Fri), WhatsApp 0609768319, email; reviews cite unresponsiveness, no callbacks.

Accessibility & Security.description: App provides digital access to cards/claims/hospitals; collects personal data (not encrypted per Play store); no POPIA breaches or security issues found in searches.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: From R2187/mo (Essence main) to R13840/mo (Platinum); Gold R8675

socialSentiment.summary: HelloPeter low (2.6, claims/service issues); iOS app 2.4/5 (bugs); company testimonials positive; no major X buzz.
